title: List Your Clothes
description: Upload unused clothes to the IJOL catalog for review.

fields.name: Item name*
fields.nameHelp: Example: plaid flannel shirt, oversized tee, black slim fit jeans.
fields.sizeHelp: Example: S, M, L, XL, 30, 32, 38, Free Size
fields.descriptionHelp: Tell us the item details: color, material, condition, reason it is unused, etc.
fields.photoHelp: Upload at least 3 photos: front, back, and condition details. Max 5MB per photo. JPG/PNG format.
fields.proofHelp: Add a label, tag, receipt, or proof of purchase to speed up review.
fields.prelovedHelp: When Pre-Loved is active, buyers need to send at least 1 unused clothing item to IJOL Fiber in any condition. This keeps one item in, one item out.
fields.impact: Every item added helps keep another item circulating in the ecosystem.
